description: Digital Board Core — REST APIs for board nodes and connections, React Flow canvas with basic node types (Box, Group, Free Text), connections, toolbar, and minimap.

userStories.title: Board Nodes REST API
userStories.description: As a developer, I want REST endpoints for board node CRUD operations so that the frontend can create, read, update, and delete board nodes with proper validation.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/ideas/:id/board/nodes returns all nodes for an idea
POST /api/ideas/:id/board/nodes creates a new node with node_type validation
PATCH /api/ideas/:id/board/nodes/:nodeId updates node content and position
DELETE /api/ideas/:id/board/nodes/:nodeId deletes node and detaches children
Validation: parent_id must reference a group-type node if set
Validation: title max 500 chars, body max 5000 chars
Locked nodes (is_locked=true) return 403 on update attempts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § board_nodes, api-design.md § Board Endpoints
Design: Backend-only
Testing: test-matrix.md § API-BOARD.01-06, DB-NODE.01-04
Files: services/gateway/apps/board/{models,views,serializers,urls,tests/test_views}.py
Gotchas: Mirror model pattern (db_table='board_nodes'), parent_id must be group node, MiddlewareAuthentication for auth

data_model: board_nodes: id uuid PK, idea_id, node_type varchar(15), title(500), body text, position_x/y float, width/height, parent_id FK self SET NULL, is_locked bool

userStories.title: Board Connections REST API
userStories.description: As a developer, I want REST endpoints for board connection CRUD operations so that the frontend can create, read, update, and delete connections between nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/ideas/:id/board/connections returns all connections
POST /api/ideas/:id/board/connections creates a connection with source_node_id and target_node_id
PATCH /api/ideas/:id/board/connections/:connId updates connection label
DELETE /api/ideas/:id/board/connections/:connId deletes connection
Validation: no self-connections (source_node_id != target_node_id)
Validation: no duplicate connections (UNIQUE constraint on source-target pair)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § board_connections, api-design.md § Board Endpoints
Design: Backend-only
Testing: test-matrix.md § API-BOARD.08-11, DB-CONN.01-03
Files: services/gateway/apps/board/{models,views,serializers,urls,tests/test_views}.py
Gotchas: unique_together(source,target) returns 409, CASCADE delete, no self-connections

data_model: board_connections: id uuid, idea_id, source_node_id FK CASCADE, target_node_id FK CASCADE, label(500), UNIQUE(source,target)

userStories.title: React Flow Canvas Setup
userStories.description: As a user, I want a React Flow canvas in the Board tab so that I can view and interact with board nodes on a pannable, zoomable canvas with a background grid.
acceptanceCriteria: Board tab renders React Flow canvas with dot grid background (20px gap)
Pan (drag) and zoom (scroll) work, zoom range 25%-200%
Background uses var(--background) design token
Minimap and zoom controls placeholders render (functional in US-009)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Architecture: project-structure.md § frontend/src/components/board/
Design: component-specs.md § 6.6 Board Canvas
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.3.01-02
Files: frontend/src/components/board/BoardCanvas.tsx, components/workspace/WorkspaceLayout.tsx
Gotchas: npm package is '@xyflow/react', Board tab exists in WorkspaceLayout from M3

components: BoardCanvas: React Flow with grid, pan, zoom

userStories.title: BoxNode Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want box nodes to render with a title bar and bullet-point body so that I can organize ideas visually on the board.
acceptanceCriteria: Box node renders with title bar (border-b) and bullet body
Min 192px, max 320px width
Border 1px solid var(--border), rounded-md, shadow-sm, bg var(--card)
Reference button (Pin icon) in top-right inserts @board[uuid] into chat
AI badge (Bot icon) shows when created_by='ai'
Lock icon (Lock) in bottom-right when is_locked=true
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § board_nodes
Design: component-specs.md § 6.1 Box Node
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.1.01, T-3.2.08, T-3.8.01-02
Files: frontend/src/components/board/BoxNode.tsx, BoardCanvas.tsx
Gotchas: React Flow nodeTypes prop, reference button → ChatInput shared state

data_model: board_nodes: node_type='box', title(500), body, created_by, is_locked

userStories.title: GroupNode Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want group nodes to render as dashed containers so that I can visually group related boxes on the board.
acceptanceCriteria: Group renders with 2px dashed border var(--border-strong)
Background var(--muted) opacity-30
Label badge top-left (bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 rounded)
Min 200x150px, resizable (React Flow ResizeControl)
Children move with parent when dragged
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § board_nodes
Design: component-specs.md § 6.2 Group Node
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.1.02/04, T-3.2.02-03
Files: frontend/src/components/board/GroupNode.tsx, BoardCanvas.tsx
Gotchas: ResizeControl for resize, parent-child via parent_id, drag in/out deferred to M5

data_model: board_nodes: node_type='group', width, height, parent_id FK self SET NULL

userStories.title: FreeTextNode Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want free text nodes to render as transparent text so that I can add labels and annotations to the board.
acceptanceCriteria: Free text renders with transparent background, no border (only dashed on hover)
Font Gotham Book text-sm, text-foreground
Click to edit opens textarea with auto-grow
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § board_nodes
Design: component-specs.md § 6.3 Free Text Node
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.1.03, T-3.2.04
Files: frontend/src/components/board/FreeTextNode.tsx, BoardCanvas.tsx
Gotchas: No title for free_text (only body), hover border CSS

userStories.title: ConnectionEdge Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want connections to render as smooth-step edges with arrowheads so that I can visualize relationships between board nodes.
acceptanceCriteria: Connections render as smoothstep edges with arrowhead on target
Stroke 1.5px gray, 2.5px on hover
Double-click opens label editor (bg-card, border, rounded-sm, text-xs)
Selected edge: stroke var(--primary) gold, 2.5px
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § board_connections
Design: component-specs.md § 6.4 Connections
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.2.05-06
Files: frontend/src/components/board/ConnectionEdge.tsx, BoardCanvas.tsx
Gotchas: React Flow edgeTypes prop, label edit via double-click

userStories.title: BoardToolbar Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a toolbar with Add Box, Delete, and Fit View buttons so that I can create nodes, delete selected items, and navigate the board.
acceptanceCriteria: Toolbar renders at top (border-b, bg-card, h-10, px-2)
Add Box (Plus icon) creates box at viewport center
Delete (Trash2) deletes selected, disabled when nothing selected
Fit View (Maximize2) zooms to fit all
Buttons ghost style, icon-sm (32px), dividers between groups
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 6.5 Board Toolbar
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.3.03
Files: frontend/src/components/board/BoardToolbar.tsx, BoardCanvas.tsx
Gotchas: Add Box uses getViewport(), Undo/Redo deferred to M5

components: BoardToolbar: Add Box, Delete, Fit View

userStories.title: Minimap and Zoom Controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want a minimap and zoom controls so that I can navigate large boards easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimap renders bottom-right (120x80px, border, rounded-sm, shadow-sm, bg-card)
Minimap shows board overview with all nodes
Zoom controls bottom-left (vertical: +, -, fit, ghost style)
Controls increase/decrease zoom or fit all
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § 6.6 Board Canvas
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-3.3.01-02

Gotchas: React Flow MiniMap and Controls built-in, style via className
